final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing product shot for a smartwatch in a minimalist business setting.

Style/medium: professional product photography, minimalist business aesthetic, emphasis on material quality and surface textures
Composition: three-quarter view of the smartwatch, shallow depth of field, slightly elevated camera angle, product as primary focal point
Subject: smartwatch with clean dial and premium finish, placed on a marble surface
Scene/backdrop: marble countertop with subtle veining, ceramic coffee cup with saucer nearby, closed leather notebook with minimal branding
Lighting/mood: soft natural light entering from the side, gentle shadows, calm and refined atmosphere
Color palette: neutral marble whites and grays, warm brown leather tones, matte black or silver watch as anchor, subtle cream from coffee cup
Materials/textures: polished marble with natural veining, smooth ceramic glaze, supple leather grain, brushed metal watch case
Avoid: harsh artificial lighting, cluttered background, oversaturated colors, plastic-looking materials, watermark, 8K stuffer terms
